summary: Testing completed for recent AdminDashboard changes: (1) Download PDF buttons work for Shift Report and Payroll Report, (2) W-9 View button opens modal viewer instead of forcing download, (3) Mileage Tracking section with CSV/PDF exports working, (4) Fixed missing Monitor and LogOutIcon imports that caused runtime errors.

details: Admin code 4399 converts to matthewjesusguzman1@gmail.com
Login redirects to /admin dashboard
Welcome toast displayed
All sections visible (All Employees, Payroll Summary, Time Entries, Hours by Employee, Form Submissions, W-9 Review, Payroll Check Records, Mileage Tracking)
No runtime errors after fix
Report button opens Shift Report modal
Generate Report button creates report with employee data
Download PDF button visible and clickable after report generation
API endpoint /api/admin/reports/pdf returns valid PDF
$ button opens Payroll Reports modal
Generate Report button creates payroll report
Download PDF button visible and clickable after report generation
API endpoint /api/admin/payroll/report/pdf returns valid PDF
Section expands/collapses correctly
Summary cards show: Total Miles (36.0), Total Trips (4), IRS Rate ($0.725/mile)
Export CSV button downloads CSV file with mileage data
Export PDF button downloads PDF file
Recent Trips list shows entries with edit/delete actions
GPS Trip Tracking UI with Start Trip button present
Employee Portal View shows W-9 status for employees
W-9 Approved employees show View button
View button opens W-9 Viewer Modal (not download)
Modal displays document in iframe for PDFs
Modal shows filename, upload date, approval status
Close and Download buttons available in modal footer
All Employees section expands/collapses
Payroll Summary section expands/collapses
Hours by Employee section expands/collapses
Form Submissions section expands/collapses
W-9 Review section expands/collapses
Payroll Check Records section expands/collapses
Mileage Tracking section expands/collapses

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed LogOutIcon to LogOut on line 1705

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about React hook dependencies (fetchData missing in dependency arrays) - not critical but should be addressed
HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in payroll table - cosmetic issue

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All tested features working after import fixes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminDashboard.jsx was updated to add Monitor and fix LogOutIcon imports. All report download buttons (Shift Report PDF, Payroll PDF) work correctly. W-9 View button now opens modal viewer instead of forcing download. Mileage Tracking section with MileageTrackingSection component works correctly with CSV/PDF exports.
